## Summary

Describe the user-visible change and why it matters.

## Linked Issue

Closes #

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Release / deployment
- [ ] Security / hardening research

## Validation

- [ ] JavaScript syntax checks pass
- [ ] Windows release build tested or not required
- [ ] Demo build tested or not required
- [ ] Screenshots updated or not required
- [ ] Documentation updated or not required
- [ ] No real company, invoice, employee, backup, or export data included

## Release Notes

Add the short release-note wording here, or write `Not needed`.

## Screenshots

Add before/after screenshots for UI changes, or write `Not needed`.
